data.content:
Plan:
1. Work in a dedicated branch/worktree from main and install worktree dependencies with bun install --frozen-lockfile.
2. Inspect src/components/directory-browser.tsx and reproduce the screenshot around the Browse for Repository modal. The likely suspect is the breadcrumb strip between the filter input and Up button: it is an overflow-x-auto row with no stable height/vertical padding, so the global scrollbar styling/browser scrollport can leave the breadcrumb text and icons clipped.
3. Fix the modal layout locally by giving the breadcrumb/navigation area stable, visible dimensions and/or grouping it with the Up action so the breadcrumb cannot be partially hidden. Keep existing navigation/filtering behavior.
4. Add focused coverage if an existing component/source test pattern can assert the intended structure. Avoid broad unrelated UI refactors.
5. Validate with lint, typecheck, unit tests, build, and a browser visual check of the repository browser.

Complexity: small UI layout fix in one component, with low behavioral risk.
Risks: visual regression depends on actual browser rendering, so a Playwright screenshot/manual browser check is required in addition to static tests.
